title: British Sardine Pudding
description: A traditional British dish made with sardines in a creamy pudding. This recipe combines the delicate flavor of sardines with the comfort of a warm pudding.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, melted butter, milk, eggs, and a pinch of salt and pepper. Mix well to combine.
Add the flaked sardines and grated cheese to the bowl and mix until fully incorporated.
Pour the mixture into a 9x5-inch loaf pan.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the pudding is set and golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
